headline: Nucor (NUE) Surpasses Market Returns: Some Facts Worth Knowing
summary: Nucor (NUE) concluded the recent trading session at $160.62, signifying a +1.29% move from its prior day's close.

headline: Toyota to invest $1 billion to increase U.S. production in Kentucky, Indiana plants
summary: Toyota on Monday announced $1 billion in investments in two U.S. plants as part of a plan to invest up to $10 billion domestically over the next five years.

raw.headline: Toyota to invest $1 billion to increase U.S. production in Kentucky, Indiana plants
raw.summary: Toyota on Monday announced $1 billion in investments in two U.S. plants as part of a plan to invest up to $10 billion domestically over the next five years.

headline: The uneven cost of tariffs: Why some households will pay more than others
summary: Households experience the financial cost of tariffs differently based on factors such as household size and consumption, economists said.

raw.headline: The uneven cost of tariffs: Why some households will pay more than others
